purpose: Viewer-ready popup metadata payload for each ground-floor Y-opening. It combines text audit rows, editable component slots, source refs and completion status without creating geometry.

objects.label: boograam achtergevel / panoramisch raam
rules: Display this as popup/source metadata only.
Do not use popup text to create wall cuts, frame geometry, glass panels or dimensions.
Use source_entity_refs to trace every popup row back to original CAD entities.
Only editable slots with exact bound geometry may later become selectable 3D objects.

rules: Display this as popup/source metadata only.
Do not use popup text to create wall cuts, frame geometry, glass panels or dimensions.
Use source_entity_refs to trace every popup row back to original CAD entities.
Only editable slots with exact bound geometry may later become selectable 3D objects.
This payload is for UI popups, validation and later custom properties only.
It must not generate or modify geometry.
Raw CAD text and display text are both kept where display normalization was useful.
Future 3D meshes must copy relevant popup metadata as custom properties only after exact geometry is bound.
